property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Program Files\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\Program Files\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Anuj\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Anuj\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Anuj\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\Scripts;C:\Users\Anuj\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;.

testcase.name: concurrentBookings_neverExceedAvailableSeats
testcase.system-out:
16:09:34.492 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bookingsystem.BookingConcurrencyTest]: BookingConcurrencyTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:09:34.882 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bookingsystem.BookingSystemApplication for test class com.bookingsystem.BookingConcurrencyTest

c.bookingsystem.service.BookingService : Optimistic lock conflict on event 1 (attempt 2), retrying... 2026-06-26T16:10:00.485+05:30 INFO 22576 --- [concurrency-safe-booking-system] [pool-3-thread-7] c.bookingsystem.service.BookingService : Optimistic lock conflict on event 1 (attempt 2), retrying... ================================================ CONCURRENCY TEST RESULTS ================================================ Total seats available at start: 5 Concurrent booking attempts fired: 20 ------------------------------------------------ Confirmed bookings (expected = 5): 5 Failed bookings (expected = 15): 15 Final availableSeats (expected = 0): 0 ------------------------------------------------ WITHOUT optimistic locking, this exact scenario would typically produce MORE than 5 confirmed bookings and/or a negative availableSeats value, because multiple threads could read the same stale seat count before any of them committed their write. See BookingService.java for the full explanation of the naive/broken version. ================================================
